description_long: This is a sporty blue hatchback car with a sleek aerodynamic design, featuring a prominent rear spoiler and black alloy wheels. The body is finished in a glossy metallic blue, with tinted windows and visible red accents on the interior seats. The front end showcases an aggressive grille, integrated headlights, and a hood scoop, while the rear is defined by a wide stance, dual exhausts, and a large rear window. The side profile reveals four doors and subtle side skirts, enhancing its performance-oriented appearance. The car sits low to the ground, emphasizing its dynamic and agile character. Overall, the vehicle combines modern styling cues with functional elements typical of high-performance hatchbacks.
description: A glossy blue, sporty hatchback car with a rear spoiler, black wheels, and red-accented interior, featuring four doors and an aggressive front grille.
description_view_0: Side view showing the car's blue body, black wheels, rear spoiler, and four-door configuration.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the aggressive grille, hood scoop, headlights, and red interior seats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the rear spoiler and side profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large rear window, rear spoiler, dual exhausts, and taillights.
